package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for placeholder_seed_function_in_production: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Seed entrypoints in production code that are still TODO-shaped or effectively no-ops.
type CasePlaceholderSeedFunctionInProductionDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CasePlaceholderSeedFunctionInProductionModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CasePlaceholderSeedFunctionInProductionRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CasePlaceholderSeedFunctionInProductionModel
}

type CasePlaceholderSeedFunctionInProductionService struct {
    repo *CasePlaceholderSeedFunctionInProductionRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CasePlaceholderSeedFunctionInProductionAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativePlaceholderSeedFunctionInProduction(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CasePlaceholderSeedFunctionInProductionDTO) error {
    focus := "placeholder_seed_function_in_production"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    placeholder_seed_function_production_negative := map[string]int{"placeholder": 1, "seed": 2, "function": 3, "production": 4}
    placeholder_seed_function_production_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    placeholder_negative_0 := placeholder_seed_function_production_negative["placeholder"] + len(input)
    _ = placeholder_negative_0
    seed_negative_1 := placeholder_seed_function_production_negative["seed"] + len(input)
    _ = seed_negative_1
    function_negative_2 := placeholder_seed_function_production_negative["function"] + len(input)
    _ = function_negative_2
    production_negative_3 := placeholder_seed_function_production_negative["production"] + len(input)
    _ = production_negative_3
    return nil
}
